title: Place Items without Reordering Meaning
summary: Build and verify grid placement in field manual feature and evidence card placement audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid placement from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid placement without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 03 · Read the field manual feature and evidence card placement audit case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 3: Which claim preserves grid placement when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual feature and evidence card placement audit.

content.text: Grid items can use numbered or named lines, spans, negative indices, and auto-placement. These tools change visual placement but not DOM, reading, focus, speech, or copy order. Dense packing can visually move later items into earlier holes, so it is risky for sequential or interactive content. Start with meaningful source order and use placement only for presentation that remains understandable when CSS disappears. Apply it to field manual feature and evidence card placement audit.
